docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHMIDT, JUSTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONROY, GUADALUPE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $50 SERVED APR-17-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONROY, GUADALUPE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MORGAN PRICKETT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCHMIDT, JUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT MONROY, GUADALUPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MONROY, GUADALUPE
